zh.Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德
zh.Shenstone, Stafford, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾申斯同

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Fowkes於1558年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德時，他的父親William Fowkes28歲，母親Joan Leveson27歲。他於1570年4月11日與Joane Moreton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年3月15日在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾布霍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Fowkes于1558年1月1日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德时，他的父亲William Fowkes28岁，母亲Joan Leveson27岁。他于1570年4月11日与Joane Moreton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年3月15日在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾布霍德。

nameMeanings.name: Fowkes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Foulks
meanings: English: from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French Folkes, Foukes, an Old French nominative form of the ancient Germanic personal name Fulco, which is derived from a linguistic element meaning ‘folk, people’. See also Foulk and Volk .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Fowkes was born on 1 January 1558, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Fowkes, was 28 and his mother, Joan Leveson, was 27. He married Joane Moreton on 11 April 1570, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 March 1594, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Brewood, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Fowkes est né le 1 janvier 1558, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Fowkes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Leveson, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joane Moreton le 11 avril 1570, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Fowkes am 1. Januar 1558 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fowkes 28 und seine Mutter Joan Leveson 27. Er hat am 11. April 1570 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joane Moreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. März 1594 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brewood, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Fowkes è nato il il 1 gennaio 1558 nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Fowkes, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Leveson, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joane Moreton il 11 aprile 1570, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Brewood, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Fowkesが1558年1月1日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで生まれた時，父William Fowkesは28歳，母Joan Levesonは27歳であった。1570年4月11日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドでJoane Moretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年3月15日に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Fowkes(이)가 1558년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fowkes(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Leveson(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1570년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 Joane Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 3월 15일 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1558–15 March 1594: 1 de janeiro de 1558–15 de março de 1594
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Fowkes nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1558, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Fowkes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Leveson, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Moreton em 11 de abril de 1570, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Fowkes родился 1 января 1558 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Fowkes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Leveson, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Moreton 11 апреля 1570 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 марта 1594 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.1 January 1558–15 March 1594: 1 de enero de 1558–15 de marzo de 1594
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Fowkes nació el 1 de enero de 1558, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Fowkes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Leveson, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joane Moreton el 11 de abril de 1570, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1594, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
